The Ultimate Guide

Learn how to buy a home in Oklahoma City without a bank, without perfect credit, and without paying a dime.

Inside the Guide

What You'll Learn

A practical, plain-English breakdown of your path to homeownership — no jargon, no fluff.

01

The 3 main paths to homeownership without a bank — and which one fits your situation

02

How Rent-to-Own works step by step, including what to watch out for in the contract

03

What Owner Financing means and why sellers offer it — and how to negotiate the terms

04

How to qualify for a home even if you've been denied by traditional lenders

05

The exact questions to ask before signing any owner-financed agreement

06

How to get into a home in OKC in as little as 30 days — a realistic timeline

Real Families

Oklahoma City Families Who Made It Happen

These are real people who used our guide and our program to become homeowners.

★★★★★

"I was denied by 3 banks because of my credit. Home Run Homes showed me there was another way. Now I'm a homeowner. I still can't believe it."

Maria G. Oklahoma City, OK
★★★★★

"We're self-employed and no bank would touch us. The guide explained everything clearly. Now we own a 3-bedroom home and our kids have a yard."

Carlos & Ana R. Moore, OK
★★★★★

"High DTI killed every mortgage application I submitted. This guide opened my eyes. Home Run Homes found me a home with owner financing in 2 weeks."

James T. Midwest City, OK
Questions

Frequently Asked

Yes, 100% free. No credit card, no hidden fees, no catch. We created this guide to help Oklahoma City families understand their options. You'll receive it instantly via email after submitting your info.

No. That's exactly what the guide is about. We specialize in alternative financing — Rent-to-Own, Lease Options, and Contract for Deed — that don't require traditional bank approval or a perfect credit score.

We serve the OKC metro area including Oklahoma City, Moore, Norman, Edmond, Midwest City, Yukon, Del City, Bethany, Newcastle, El Reno, The Village, Tulsa, and Shawnee.

No. The guide is a genuine educational resource. After you download it, our team may reach out to see if we can help you find a home — but there's no pressure and no obligation.

We're a matchmaking service — we connect qualified buyers with property owners who offer owner financing or rent-to-own arrangements. Our service is 100% free for buyers. One or more owners holds an active Oklahoma real estate license.

Privacy Policy Terms of Service Home

This is an educational guide only, not legal or financial advice. One or more owners of Home Run Homes holds an active real estate license in Oklahoma. Home Run Homes is a matchmaking service connecting buyers with owner-financed properties. Always read agreements before signing and consult with appropriate professionals before making any real estate decisions. Results vary by individual situation.
